takePhoto: Take a photo — it appears on the screen instantly.
takePhotoVideo: Take a photo — it appears on the screen instantly.

app.emailHelp: We'll email you a link to download all the photos after the event.
app.identityNote: Your name appears next to your photos. Your email is only used to send you the photos after the event.
app.empty: Nothing yet - your uploads will appear here.
app.footer: Photos are stored by the host and deleted after the event.
app.deletePhotoMessage: This removes the photo from your uploads and the event's screen.
app.emailRequired: We need your email to send you the photos after the event.
app.nameTaken: That name is already taken for this event.
app.joinFailed: Could not save that name. Try again.
app.sessionExpired: Your session has expired - please join again.
app.eventLimit: This event has reached its upload limit.
app.uploadsOpen: Uploads open 24 hours before the event.
